Hotels.Name: Novotel Visakhapatnam Varun Beach
Hotels.Description: Visakhapatnam's premier beachfront 5-star hotel sitting directly on Varun Beach with sweeping Bay of Bengal views. Features multiple dining outlets, a rooftop infinity pool, and the popular Infinity Bar & Kitchen. Ideal for cruise crew seeking luxury minutes from the port.
Hotels.Address: Varun Beach, Nowroji Road, Krishna Nagar, Maharani Peta, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530002

Hotels.Name: The Park Visakhapatnam
Hotels.Description: The Park is a stylish 5-star boutique hotel perched above the Bay of Bengal on Beach Road. Home to Tribe (the only beachfront club in Vizag), the rooftop Some Place Else bar, and the Aqua pool bar. A favourite of international cruise guests for its unmatched sea-view ambience.
Hotels.Address: Beach Road, VUDA Park Area, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530023

Hotels.Name: Four Points by Sheraton Visakhapatnam
Hotels.Description: A well-appointed Marriott property in the upscale Waltair area, featuring Vizag's only ozonised pool, the Eatery multi-cuisine restaurant, and the Best Brews craft bar. Just minutes from RK Beach and major shopping centres. Excellent for both leisure and business travellers.
Hotels.Address: 10-28-3, Uplands, Waltair Main Road, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530003

Hotels.Name: Fairfield by Marriott Visakhapatnam
Hotels.Description: A modern 4-star hotel offering consistent Marriott-standard comfort at competitive rates. Complimentary hot breakfast, a well-equipped gym, and the Kava bar make it popular with business visitors. Located near the Steel Plant and NSTL area with easy port connectivity.
Hotels.Address: Vizag Steel Plant Plaza Road, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530031

Hotels.Name: The Port Hotel Visakhapatnam
Hotels.Description: A charming 31-room boutique hotel conceived as a tribute to the port city, with a striking shipping container-inspired facade. The Pier 57 restaurant serves signature dishes celebrating Vizag's maritime culture. Centrally located, making it the easiest base for exploring the city from the port.
Hotels.Address: 28, 9-57, Chitralaya Road, Suryabagh, Near Jagadamba Junction, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530020

Hotels.Name: Minerva Grand Nellore
Hotels.Description: Nellore's leading business hotel, offering well-appointed rooms, a multi-cuisine restaurant, and banquet facilities. The most comfortable base for Krishnapatnam port visitors, located in the heart of Nellore city. Provides easy road connectivity to the port, approximately 21 km away.
Hotels.Address: D.No. 26/3, Gandhi Nagar, Nellore, Andhra Pradesh 524001

Hotels.Name: Regenta Inn Bhavani Nellore
Hotels.Description: A dependable Royal Orchid group property in Nellore offering 41 comfortable rooms, a continental breakfast, and an on-site restaurant. Convenient for Krishnapatnam port business travellers with a professional atmosphere and friendly service. Within easy reach of Sri Ranganathaswamy Temple.
Hotels.Address: Near Penchalakona Temple Road, Nellore, Andhra Pradesh 524001

Hotels.Name: Hotel Seasons Inn Nellore
Hotels.Description: A comfortable mid-range hotel in Nellore popular with port visitors and business travellers. Offers 45 air-conditioned rooms, an in-house restaurant, coffee shop, and conference facilities. Conveniently located near major Nellore landmarks and bus/rail connectivity.

Hotels.Name: Krishnapatnam Grand Inn
Hotels.Description: The most conveniently located hotel for Krishnapatnam Port, situated just 2 km from the port gates in Muthukur town. Basic but clean accommodation ideal for port officials, cargo crews, and budget travellers. The only hotel within walking distance of the port entrance.
Hotels.Address: 3/107, Opposite HP Petrol Bunk, Krishnapatnam Port Main Road, Muthukur, Nellore, Andhra Pradesh 524344

Hotels.Name: Hotel Tejaswini Grand Nellore
Hotels.Description: A well-regarded business hotel in Nellore with spacious rooms and a well-reviewed in-house restaurant serving Andhra and North Indian cuisine. Popular choice for corporate travellers visiting the Krishnapatnam port area. Offers good value and reliable service.

Restaurants.Name: Infinity Bar & Kitchen – Novotel
Restaurants.Popular For: Bay of Bengal Views, North Indian, Continental, Grills
Restaurants.Description: A stunning rooftop restaurant and bar at Novotel, offering breathtaking panoramic views of the Bay of Bengal through floor-to-ceiling glass walls. The menu spans North Indian, Continental, and grilled specialities. The perfect sunset dining experience for cruise visitors.
Restaurants.Address: Novotel Visakhapatnam, Varun Beach, Maharani Peta, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530002

Restaurants.Name: Zaffran – Novotel Vizag
Restaurants.Popular For: Nawabi Cuisine, Biryani, Kebabs, Coastal Andhra Specialities
Restaurants.Description: One of Vizag's finest Indian fine-dining restaurants, Zaffran at Novotel specialises in Nawabi Mughlai cuisine alongside coastal Andhra classics. Opulent decor, live ghazal music evenings, and impeccable service. Highly rated by both locals and visiting dignitaries.
Restaurants.Address: Novotel Visakhapatnam, Varun Beach, Maharani Peta, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530002

Restaurants.Name: Bamboo Bay Restaurant
Restaurants.Popular For: Fresh Seafood, Andhra Fish Curry, Prawn Fry, Beachside Dining
Restaurants.Description: A beloved beachside restaurant at Bheemunipatnam (Bhimili), famous for its finger-licking fresh seafood and traditional Andhra-style fish preparations. The laid-back atmosphere with the sound of waves makes it one of Vizag district's most memorable dining experiences.
Restaurants.Address: Bheemunipatnam Beach Road, Bhimili, Visakhapatnam District, Andhra Pradesh 531163

Restaurants.Name: Dakshin Restaurant – The Park
Restaurants.Popular For: South Indian Breakfast, Biryani, Seafood, Poolside Dining
Restaurants.Description: The Park Hotel's all-day dining restaurant offering the best of South Indian cuisine alongside continental favourites. Famous for its generous Andhra-style buffet breakfast and freshly prepared biryanis. The poolside seating overlooking the Bay of Bengal is a particular draw.
Restaurants.Address: Beach Road, The Park Visakhapatnam, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530023

Restaurants.Name: Haritha Beach Resort Restaurant
Restaurants.Popular For: Andhra Thali, Seafood, Rushikonda Beach Views, Budget Friendly
Restaurants.Description: APTDC's popular beach resort restaurant at the scenic Rushikonda Beach, serving authentic Andhra thalis and fresh seafood at very reasonable government-hotel prices. The beachfront location with palm trees and crashing waves creates a quintessentially Vizag experience.

Restaurants.Name: Mayuri Multicuisine Restaurant
Restaurants.Popular For: Biryani, Andhra Meals, North Indian, Family Dining
Restaurants.Description: One of Nellore's most popular family restaurants, celebrated for its generous Andhra-style biryani and traditional meals. A consistent go-to for port visitors and locals alike. The large, air-conditioned dining hall comfortably accommodates groups from the port.

Restaurants.Name: Amaravathi Highway Restaurant
Restaurants.Popular For: Andhra Meals, Seafood Curry, Chicken Biryani, Quick Service
Restaurants.Description: A popular highway restaurant midway between Nellore city and Krishnapatnam Port, making it the most convenient meal stop for port-bound crew and visitors. Known for its authentic Andhra rice meals, rasam, and locally caught fish preparations. Hygienic, fast, and very affordable.

Restaurants.Name: Cloud9 Restobar Nellore
Restaurants.Popular For: Cocktails, Grills, Andhra Seafood, Air-Conditioned Comfort
Restaurants.Description: Nellore's most popular contemporary restobar, offering a comfortable air-conditioned environment, a well-stocked bar, and a diverse menu of grills and Andhra seafood. A popular evening destination for port professionals and Nellore's young crowd. Booking recommended on weekends.

Restaurants.Name: Komala Vilas Restaurant
Restaurants.Popular For: South Indian Tiffin, Dosa, Filter Coffee, Sweets
Restaurants.Description: A Nellore institution for over 40 years, Komala Vilas serves outstanding South Indian vegetarian fare including crispy dosas, idlis, and freshly ground filter coffee. An early-morning favourite for port crew arriving by road from Nellore. Incredibly affordable and consistently excellent.

Restaurants.Name: 5 Star Sea Food Restaurant
Restaurants.Popular For: Nellore Fish Curry, Prawn Biryani, Crab, Bay of Bengal Catch
Restaurants.Description: Nellore is celebrated across Andhra Pradesh for its unique fish curry, and this well-known seafood restaurant delivers the most authentic version in town. Specialises in freshly sourced Bay of Bengal catch including prawns, crab, and local fish varieties. A must-visit for seafood lovers.
Restaurants.Address: Near Old Bus Stand, Nellore, Andhra Pradesh 524001

Pubs & Nightlife.Name: Tribe – The Park Visakhapatnam
Pubs & Nightlife.Popular For: Only Beachfront Club in Vizag, DJ Nights, Cocktails, Sea Views
Pubs & Nightlife.Description: Vizag's most iconic nightlife destination — the only beachfront club in the city, nestled among palm trees at The Park Hotel with direct Bay of Bengal views. The rustic tribal-inspired decor sets the mood for DJ nights spanning Bollywood, EDM, and hip-hop. Dress code applies.
Pubs & Nightlife.Address: The Park Hotel, Beach Road, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530023

Pubs & Nightlife.Name: Harbour Vue – Novotel Vizag
Pubs & Nightlife.Popular For: Sea Views, Signature Cocktails, International Spirits, Live DJ
Pubs & Nightlife.Description: Novotel's upscale lounge bar offering sweeping views of the harbour and Bay of Bengal. Features an extensive selection of international malts, cognacs, wines, and signature cocktails. A resident DJ plays retro and rock on weekends. The most luxurious bar experience in Visakhapatnam.
Pubs & Nightlife.Address: Novotel Visakhapatnam, Varun Beach, Maharani Peta, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530002

Pubs & Nightlife.Name: Ironhill Brewery Visakhapatnam
Pubs & Nightlife.Popular For: Craft Beer, Mango Cider, Live Music, Multi-Floor Pub
Pubs & Nightlife.Description: One of India's trendiest craft brewery chains, Ironhill Vizag spans multiple floors with vibrant hand-painted decor, wooden sculptures, and photo-worthy interiors. Brews its own ciders, lagers, and ales using seasonal fruits and German-sourced ingredients. Always buzzing with live music on weekends.

Pubs & Nightlife.Name: MYZ – UNO Vizag
Pubs & Nightlife.Popular For: House-Brewed Beer, Live Music, Dance Floor, Continental & Indian
Pubs & Nightlife.Description: A vibrant multi-zone restobar at the heart of Vizag's VIP Road entertainment district. Features house-brewed maize beer, a spacious dance floor, private dining rooms, and regular live music and Bollywood nights. One of Vizag's most consistently popular nightlife destinations.
Pubs & Nightlife.Address: Central Building, 4, VIP Road, Siripuram, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530016

Pubs & Nightlife.Name: Kava Bar – Fairfield by Marriott
Pubs & Nightlife.Popular For: Extensive Cocktail Menu, Whisky Selection, Sophisticated Ambience
Pubs & Nightlife.Description: The signature cocktail lounge at Fairfield by Marriott, Kava is Vizag's most upscale hotel bar experience. Renowned for its sophisticated ambience, extensive cocktail and whisky menu, and excellent service. Particularly popular among port business travellers and corporate guests.
Pubs & Nightlife.Address: Fairfield by Marriott, Steel Plant Road, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530031

Pubs & Nightlife.Name: Simhapuri Bar N Restaurant
Pubs & Nightlife.Popular For: Beer, Andhra Seafood, Spirits, Family-Friendly Dining
Pubs & Nightlife.Description: One of Nellore's most established bar-restaurants, popular with locals and port professionals alike. Offers a good selection of beer, spirits, and a solid menu of Andhra non-vegetarian dishes. A reliable and comfortable choice for an evening drink near the Krishnapatnam port base.
Pubs & Nightlife.Address: Railway Station Road, Kapatipalem, Santhapet, Nellore, Andhra Pradesh 524001

Pubs & Nightlife.Name: Cloud9 Restobar (Bar Section)
Pubs & Nightlife.Popular For: Cocktails, Premium Spirits, Grills, AC Comfort
Pubs & Nightlife.Description: The bar section at Cloud9 doubles as Nellore's most popular cocktail destination, with a creative drinks menu and comfortable air-conditioned lounge seating. The go-to spot for port-area professionals seeking a sophisticated evening out. Dress code is smart casual.

Pubs & Nightlife.Name: PLN Restaurant and Bar
Pubs & Nightlife.Description: A no-frills local bar and restaurant close to the Krishnapatnam port access road, popular with truck drivers, port workers, and passing travellers. Serves cold beer, toddy, and generous Andhra seafood plates at very affordable prices. The most accessible drinking spot near the port.
Pubs & Nightlife.Address: Nellorepalem, Atmakur Road, Nellore, Andhra Pradesh 524322

Sightseeing.Name: INS Kurusura Submarine Museum
Sightseeing.Description: Asia's first and the world's second submarine museum, housed in the decommissioned Soviet-built INS Kurusura right on RK Beach. Visitors can explore the torpedo room, control room, crew quarters, and engine room. A unique and deeply immersive experience celebrating the Indian Navy's Eastern Command.
Sightseeing.Address: RK Beach Road, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530002

Sightseeing.Name: Kailasagiri Hill Park
Sightseeing.Description: A beautifully landscaped hilltop park perched 360 metres above sea level, offering breathtaking panoramic views of the Visakhapatnam coastline, port, and city. Features a giant Shiva-Parvati statue, a ropeway / cable car, and a floral clock. The best viewpoint for the port from land.

Sightseeing.Name: Dolphin's Nose Lighthouse
Sightseeing.Description: A dramatic 174-metre headland shaped like a dolphin's nose, housing a fully functional lighthouse open to the public from 3–5 PM daily. Offers stunning views of the Gangavaram port, Bay of Bengal, and surrounding Eastern Ghats. One of the most photographed viewpoints on India's East Coast.
Sightseeing.Address: Dolphin's Nose, Gangavaram, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530005

Sightseeing.Name: Rushikonda Beach
Sightseeing.Description: Visakhapatnam's most scenic beach, with clean golden sands, clear blue water, and a backdrop of forested Eastern Ghats hills. Offers water sports including surfing, parasailing, and jet-skiing. Designated a Blue Flag beach and consistently ranked among India's top 10 beaches.

Sightseeing.Name: TU 142 Aircraft Museum (Navy)
Sightseeing.Description: India's first and only aircraft museum of its kind, housed in a decommissioned Soviet TU-142 Maritime Reconnaissance aircraft mounted on the beach. Visitors can step inside the giant aircraft and explore its crew stations and equipment. A fascinating companion attraction to the nearby Submarine Museum.
Sightseeing.Address: RK Beach Road, Near INS Kurusura Museum, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530002

Sightseeing.Name: Bheemunipatnam (Bhimili) Beach
Sightseeing.Description: One of the oldest Dutch settlements in Asia, Bhimili is a tranquil beach town about 24 km north of Vizag with a long, uncrowded beach, a historic Dutch cemetery, and a lighthouse. Popular for sunrise walks and fresh seafood at local shacks. A peaceful half-day excursion from the port.

Sightseeing.Name: Krishnapatnam Lighthouse & Beach
Sightseeing.Description: The iconic Krishnapatnam Lighthouse stands on the northern banks of the Kandaleru River, offering panoramic coastal views from its observation deck. The adjacent pristine beach is less commercialised than most Andhra beaches, offering a peaceful natural retreat. Photography of port shipping operations (from public areas) is a big draw.
Sightseeing.Address: Krishnapatnam Village, Near Port, Muthukur Mandal, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh 524344

Sightseeing.Name: Mypadu Beach
Sightseeing.Description: A pristine and largely untouched beach on the Bay of Bengal, just 15 km from Krishnapatnam Port. Known for its turtle nesting sites and Olive Ridley sea turtle conservation efforts. The APTDC beach resort here provides a comfortable base for nature lovers exploring this protected coastal ecosystem.
Sightseeing.Address: Mypadu Village, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh 524131

Sightseeing.Name: Sri Ranganathaswamy Temple Nellore
Sightseeing.Description: One of the finest and most sacred Vishnu temples in Andhra Pradesh, built in the traditional Dravidian architectural style. The temple complex features magnificent sculpted gopurams and serene water tanks. A deeply spiritual and culturally significant site, this is Nellore's most prominent landmark.
Sightseeing.Address: Ranganathaswamy Temple Road, Nellore, Andhra Pradesh 524001

Sightseeing.Name: Kandaleru Dam & Reservoir
Sightseeing.Description: A massive irrigation dam on the Kandaleru River about 35 km from Nellore, offering scenic picnic spots, boating, and stunning reservoir views. Popular with Nellore residents as a weekend getaway. The verdant surroundings and migratory birds make it an ideal nature excursion from the port area.

Sightseeing.Name: Udayagiri Fort
Sightseeing.Description: A well-preserved 16th-century hill fort built by the Vijayanagara Empire on a rocky hilltop, offering commanding views of the surrounding Nellore plains. Features ancient gateways, granaries, and the historic Sri Venkatachalapathi temple within its walls. An outstanding historical excursion from Krishnapatnam.
